The question is asking if there are any coaches in the dataset who do not have Denmark as their nationality. Since each row represents a coach and the "nationality" column indicates the country they are from, we need to check if there are any differing nationalities listed. To analyze this, we can use the f_group_column(nationality) operation to group the coaches based on their nationality to see if there are any non-Danish entries.

All the coaches listed in the table have Denmark as their nationality. There are no coaches with a nationality other than Denmark. Therefore, the answer is that no coaches were of a non-Denmark nationality.
